race.description: Tasmanian Labor Eric Reece Memorial Mobile Pace
race.comment: FANCY ANOTHER (8) has been racing well and has the hoof on the till after seconds in her last two outings, the latest at this venue when she came from out wide. Drawn to enjoy an economical run and the sprint lane is in play. Could break through. MILLYCENT (11) was competitive when fifth last start at this venue, beaten only 2.8 metres. Has had nearly four weeks off since but was kept up to the mark with an easy trial win. Big chance. PHLOW JO (2) hasn't raced for four months but was readied with a nice trial and draws well so expect a good effort to kick off this prep. KING BART (12) came from a similar barrier for a resuming second and has trialled since so should have come on.
